welcome.title: Welcome to the User Study
welcome.subtitle: Evidence-First Authoring System Evaluation
welcome.description: Thank you for participating in this study. You will be asked to read and evaluate petition letters, then complete interactive tasks. The entire study takes approximately 45-60 minutes.
welcome.enterIdHint: Please enter the participant ID provided by the researcher.
welcome.resumePrompt: We found a previous session for this ID. Would you like to resume?

consent.title: Informed Consent
consent.purposeText: This study aims to evaluate different approaches for generating petition letters in immigration cases. Your participation will help us understand the effectiveness and usability of these approaches.
consent.proceduresText: You will: (1) read and compare petition letters generated by different systems, (2) rate them on several dimensions, (3) use an interactive system to complete writing tasks, and (4) answer survey questions about your experience.
consent.risksText: This study involves minimal risk. You may experience mild fatigue from reading and evaluating text. You will receive compensation as described in the recruitment materials.
consent.confidentialityText: Your responses will be anonymized and stored securely. Only aggregate results will be reported in publications. Your participant ID cannot be linked to your identity.
consent.voluntaryText: Your participation is voluntary. You may withdraw at any time without penalty.
consent.agree: I have read and understood the above information and agree to participate.

phase1.title: Phase 1: Comparative Evaluation
phase1.instruction: Please carefully read the following three petition letters generated for the same case by different systems. After reading, you will rate each on several dimensions.
phase1.readComplete: I have finished reading. Proceed to scoring.
phase1.scoringInstruction: For each dimension below, drag the slider to assign a score (0-100) for each system.
phase1.commentPlaceholder: Any additional thoughts on this system's output...
phase1.confirmSubmit: Are you sure? Ratings cannot be changed after submission.

phase2.title: Phase 2: Interactive Task
phase2.instruction: You will now use an interactive system to complete a writing task. Please follow the instructions carefully.
phase2.taskDescription: Use the system to review case materials and generate a petition letter for the given case.
phase2.taskComplete: Task completed. Please answer a few questions about your experience.
phase2.connectionError: Unable to connect to the main system
phase2.connectionErrorHint: Please ensure the main system is running on localhost:5173, then retry.

postStudy.title: Post-Study Questionnaire
postStudy.overallPreferenceDesc: Which system did you find most useful overall?
postStudy.openFeedbackDesc: Please share any additional thoughts, suggestions, or comments about your experience.

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.message: Your responses have been recorded successfully. Thank you for your valuable participation in this study.
thankYou.studyComplete: You may now close this window.
thankYou.contactInfo: If you have any questions, please contact the research team.

admin.title: Study Administration
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this participant's data?
admin.confirmClearAll: This will delete ALL participant data. Are you sure?
